questions.text:
Create a detailed 2-year career roadmap for yourself as a blockchain professional leveraging the MST ecosystem. Your roadmap must include:
• Your chosen career track (Startup, Agency, Protocol, or Founder) with a clear justification based on your personality, risk tolerance, and life goals.
• A 6-month-by-6-month plan (4 phases) with concrete, measurable milestones: skills to acquire, projects to build, community contributions, income targets, and role titles.
• How you will specifically use at least three MST ecosystem resources (e.g., SARAL, WASMify, MST Grant Program, MST Discord, DevRel, hackathons) to accelerate your path.
• The biggest risk in your chosen track and your specific contingency plan if things go wrong.
• A statement of what “success” looks like at the 24-month mark, in specific, non-vague terms (e.g., “I will be a Senior Smart Contract Engineer at a DeFi startup earning ₹35 LPA + 1% token allocation,” not “I will be successful”).
questions.explanation:
5 marks - Track choice with personal justification. Demonstrates understanding of own strengths, weaknesses, and preferences; aligns with the track's characteristics.
          5 marks - 6-month phase plan with measurable milestones. Each phase contains specific, verifiable achievements (not “learn more Solidity,” but “deploy a staking contract on MST testnet with 100% test coverage”).
          5 marks - MST ecosystem integration. Names at least 3 MST-specific resources (e.g., SARAL for user onboarding, WASMify for off-chain computation, MST Grant for funding) and explains concretely how they will be used at specific phases.
          3 marks - Risk acknowledgment and contingency plan. Identifies a genuine risk of the chosen track and provides a realistic, actionable backup plan.
          2 marks - Clarity of 24-month success vision. Defines success in unambiguous, quantifiable terms (job title, salary, equity, revenue, etc.).
          Total: 20 marks. Submit as a 1-2 page PDF named YourName_Roadmap_20.5.pdf.
questions.modelAnswer:
📊 Marking Scheme (20 marks)

5 marks - Track choice with personal justification. Demonstrates understanding of own strengths, weaknesses, and preferences; aligns with the track's characteristics.
5 marks - 6-month phase plan with measurable milestones. Each phase contains specific, verifiable achievements (not “learn more Solidity,” but “deploy a staking contract on MST testnet with 100% test coverage”).
5 marks - MST ecosystem integration. Names at least 3 MST-specific resources (e.g., SARAL for user onboarding, WASMify for off-chain computation, MST Grant for funding) and explains concretely how they will be used at specific phases.
3 marks - Risk acknowledgment and contingency plan. Identifies a genuine risk of the chosen track and provides a realistic, actionable backup plan.
2 marks - Clarity of 24-month success vision. Defines success in unambiguous, quantifiable terms (job title, salary, equity, revenue, etc.).
Total: 20 marks. Submit as a 1-2 page PDF named YourName_Roadmap_20.5.pdf.
